description: Original Caly TTS lines ť sing-song preschool-show energy. Assent-aware, celebratory.

toddler.game_intro: Hi, hi, hi! I am Caly ť call me Sprout! Let's play, play, play! Tap the picture you hear!
toddler.tap_intro: Tap, tap, tap! Listen close! Find the word I say!
toddler.tap_prompt: Tap, tap, tap! Can you find {word}? {word}! {word}!
toddler.match_intro: Picture match, picture match! Which one is {word}? {word}!
toddler.caly_says_intro: Caly Says! Caly Says! Listen, listen, then tap!
toddler.parade_intro: Word parade! Watch them go! Then tap the one I name!
toddler.bubble_intro: Bubble pop words! Pop, pop, pop! Tap the bubble I name!
toddler.peek_intro: Peek-a-Caly! Peek-a-Caly! Where am I hiding?
toddler.peek_found: You found me! Peek-a-boo! There I am!
toddler.song_circle_intro: Song circle time! Clap and tap along!
toddler.song_circle_cue: If you're happy, tap HAPPY! HAPPY! HAPPY!
toddler.show_hello_intro: Hello song time! Sing with Caly (Sprout)!
correct: Yay, yay, yay! You did it!
Yes, yes, yes! You found it!
Every try is a win! Yay!
try_again: Good try, good try! Look again!
That's okay! Skip or try once more!
toddler.skip: Skip, skip, skip! That's okay! New word coming!
toddler.streak_3: Three in a row! Three in a row! Word superstar!
toddler.caregiver_cue: Grown-ups: point and say the word calmly. No pressure!

child.game_intro: Hey, hey! Caly here — your Bud guide! Ready for a word adventure?
child.tap_intro: Quest time! Find the word on the board!
child.tap_prompt: Which picture means {word}? {word}! Go, go, go!
child.match_intro: Match match! Find the picture for {word}!
child.caly_says_intro: Quest challenge! Caly says ť listen and tap!
child.parade_intro: Symbol parade! Watch them bounce! Find my word!
child.bubble_intro: Bubble pop quest! Pop the word bubble!
child.peek_intro: Where is Caly? Peek and find me!
child.song_circle_intro: Song circle! Tap on the beat!
child.song_circle_cue: If you're happy, tap HAPPY! On the beat!
child.show_hello_beat: Hello, hello! Let's say hello! HELLO!
try_again: Not quite ť hint or skip?
Good effort! Try again or skip!
child.caregiver_cue: Caregivers: model if they want help ť no pressure.
